prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime illustration of an Alice in Wonderland inspired gothic lolita girl seated on a clean white background, shown in a dramatic three-quarter pose with her face intentionally covered by a centered opaque square censor block in muted beige-pink. She has very long flowing pale blonde hair with soft curls and loose strands, decorated with black and navy bows, lace headband details, and a red rose hair ornament. Dress her in an ornate blue, black, and white frilled lolita dress with puff sleeves, layered ruffles, black corset lacing, gold embroidery, heart motifs, a blue gemstone bow at the collar, and a flared skirt lifted by the seated pose. Add Alice-themed accessories: a gold pocket watch hanging at her waist, a wristwatch over a white ruffled cuff, striped black-and-white thigh-high stockings, black garters, and small bow accents. She sits with one hand extended toward the viewer in the foreground, knees bent outward, creating strong depth and foreshortening. Surround her with playing-card suits, blue spades, red hearts, diamond icons, tiny stars, confetti, and geometric card fragments, plus red roses and scattered heart-shaped petals near the floor. Use polished modern anime rendering with crisp line art, glossy highlights, intricate fabric folds, luminous pastel lighting, high saturation blue-black contrast, elegant fantasy details, and a clean studio-white background.
